headline: Angel Studios Inc (ANGX) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Revenue Growth Amidst Rising Costs
summary: Angel Studios Inc (ANGX) reports a 254% revenue increase and significant guild membership growth, despite facing challenges in profitability and rising marketing expenses.

content.title: Angel Studios Inc (ANGX) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Revenue Growth Amidst Rising Costs

headline: Assessing Himax Technologies (HIMX) Valuation After AI Data Center And Smart Glasses Supplier Speculation
summary: Himax Technologies (HIMX) is back in the spotlight after reports linked it to Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company’s co packaged optics for Nvidia AI data centers, as well as possible Apple smart glasses exposure and recent Embedded World 2026 product showcases. See our latest analysis for Himax Technologies.
